subtitle: A beach in eastern Crete backed by Europe's largest natural palm grove, where roughly 5,000 endemic Cretan date palms grow behind a fence put up to undo the damage of the crowds the place attracts.
spike_statement: The largest natural grove of the endemic palm Phoenix theophrasti in Europe grows on the sand behind this beach.

levers.photo_tone: deep palm-green canopy over pale sand, hard Aegean light
